title: Epidemiology Forecast
summary: Reproduce the 2021-22 CDC FluSight influenza-hospitalization end-of-season scorecard and per-cell scoring table from staged forecast and truth data.
taskPrompt:
You are working on a Linux VM to reproduce the 2021-22 CDC FluSight influenza-hospitalization forecast scorecard.

## Variant
`base`: 2021-22 FluSight hospitalization scoring bundle

## Visible Input Files
- forecast table: `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/epidemiology_forecast/base/input/forecasts_2021-22.parquet`
- truth table: `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/epidemiology_forecast/base/input/truth_2021-22.csv`
- runtime manifest: `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/epidemiology_forecast/base/input/runtime_env/`

## Your Task
1. Filter the staged forecast rows to the required submission window, targets, quantile type, and non-US jurisdictions.
2. Join the staged truth table on `(location, target_end_date)`.
3. Apply the round-outward quantile rule exactly.
4. Compute per-cell `wis`, `ae_median`, `cov50_hit`, and `cov95_hit` for the eligible models.
5. Aggregate the per-cell results into per-model `wis`, `rel_wis`, `mae`, `cov50`, and `cov95`.
6. Write `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/epidemiology_forecast/base/output/per_cell_scores.csv` and `/media/user/data/agenthle/health_medicine/epidemiology_forecast/base/output/submission.csv`.

## Output Requirements
- `per_cell_scores.csv` columns: `model, location, target_end_date, target, wis, ae_median, cov50_hit, cov95_hit`
- `submission.csv` columns: `model, wis, rel_wis, mae, cov50, cov95`
- Use the staged files as the source of truth.
- Do not modify files under `input/`, `reference/`, `output_test_pos/`, or `output_test_neg/`.
agentMustDo: Read the staged forecast parquet and truth CSV from `input/`.
Install any needed task-local dependencies from `input/runtime_env/`.
Reproduce the per-cell WIS, median-absolute-error, and coverage calculations for the eligible models.
Write both required CSV outputs into `output/` with the exact required schemas.

inputFiles.name: forecasts_2021-22.parquet
inputFiles.description: Long-format quantile forecasts for the 2021-22 FluSight hospitalization round.

inputFiles.name: truth_2021-22.csv
inputFiles.description: Observed weekly hospitalization counts aligned to the scored target_end_date values.

inputFiles.name: runtime_env/
inputFiles.description: Agent-installable dependency manifest for the scoring workflow.

evaluation: The evaluator checks that both required CSVs exist, have the required schemas, match the hidden row sets, and stay within the documented numeric tolerances. The common positive replay result is `1.0`; the staged negative replay result is `0.0`.

classifier.rationale: The task involves epidemiology forecasting related to public health.
